confirm: Hb electrophoresis / HPLC (HbS band), 2 orthogonal methods
exclude IDA/megaloblastic; family history; osmotic gradient ektacytometry; EPB41/SPTA1/SPTB
source: StatPearls NBK562333; Merck Manual (>=60% + family hx)

confirm: DAT/Coombs (+ -> AIHA, - -> HS); EMA-binding flow cytometry; MCHC; reticulocytes
source: ASH Blood 2013 (EMA binding); ICSH spherocyte grading

confirm: URGENT: schistocytes >1% is clinically significant; platelets, LDH, haptoglobin, coags, ADAMTS13, clinical context
source: ICSH schistocyte guideline (>1% threshold); StatPearls NBK562141

confirm: leukoerythroblastic picture (nucleated RBCs + left-shifted granulocytes); bone marrow biopsy; JAK2/CALR/MPL
CBC indices (low MCV/MCH, high RDW); ferritin/iron studies; pencil cells support IDA
low MCV with NORMAL/low RDW (vs IDA's high RDW); Hb electrophoresis (HbA2/HbF); iron studies normal
source: Merck Manual; distinguish from IDA by RDW + iron studies

confirm: high MCV; macro-ovalocytes + hypersegmented neutrophils; serum B12/folate, LDH, bilirubin
Hb electrophoresis/HPLC; MCV (low -> thalassemia/HbC, normal/high -> liver); LFTs
source: ASH Image Bank (target cells); Merck Manual (HbC)

confirm: renal function (urea/creatinine); echinocytes are also a common storage/EDTA artifact
LFTs; alcohol history; stomatocytes are also a smear/EDTA artifact in low numbers
no single pattern dominates; correlate with CBC indices and clinical context
